# DISCOVER Runnable Workflows

Every workflow opens in `Preview Only`, validates allowed input before persistence, creates one primary functional template, validates the closed schema, records unanswered questions and stops at its declared human decision gate. Organizational workflows require an active organizational hat and authority and emit a scope-appropriate `control_audit_receipt`; that receipt is not approval evidence. WF-24 is the explicit owner-private exception: it uses `private_individual`, DATA-D3-PRIVATE and owner self-review with no institutional authority, approval or separate receipt.

## WF-01 — Define My Research & Innovation Mission and 90-Day Focus

**Inventory ID:** `DSC-WF-01`; **Power:** `PWR-01`; **Mode:** Preview Only<br>
**Template/schema:** `TPL-01` / `leader_identity_authority_mission`<br>
**Primary safe finish:** Compass preview + authority questions

**Trigger:** The named research/innovation leadership question needs a governed, reviewable preview.<br>
**Allowed input:** DATA-D0/D1 or an externally prepared, human-approved DATA-D2 aggregate with provenance, suppression and export evidence; never person-level/raw narrative data.<br>
**Output:** `TPL-01` draft validated against `leader_identity_authority_mission`; Compass preview + authority questions.<br>
**Human gate:** The named accountable domain owner reviews the exact object/version/hash and supplies any approval through the authoritative system.<br>
**Stop/fallback:** On authority, boundary, data, source, schema, partition or action failure, generate nothing consequential; show the blocker, official human route and discard/rollback option.<br>
**Receipt:** Emit `control_audit_receipt` with expected/observed state, action and data deltas; it cannot manufacture approval.<br>
**Expiry:** Earliest of authority, source, approval, data-use, protocol, policy or configured review expiry; expiry forces re-review.

**Steps**

1. Declare owner, active hat, authority source/expiry, intended decision and non-goals.
2. Accept only DATA-D0/D1 or externally prepared approved DATA-D2 aggregate metadata; reject prohibited/person-level input before persistence.
3. Run FRAME + TRACE and preserve facts, assumptions, unknowns, contradictions, burden/equity questions and official routes.
4. Populate TPL-01 as a clearly labeled draft; validate `leader_identity_authority_mission` and bind source/object hashes.
5. Show named accountable human gate, expiry, correction, discard/rollback and official-system route; emit a tamper-evident receipt and stop.

**Hard stop:** Missing/expired authority, prohibited data, unresolved consequential boundary, stale/retracted/hash-mismatched source, missing approval evidence, cross-partition request or requested action outside the ceiling stops before generation and routes to a named human. External send, submission, publication, spend, deployment, recruitment, consent, enrollment, official write and autonomous decision are absent.

## WF-24 — Create My Private Whole-Life Purpose and Renewal Plan

**Inventory ID:** `DSC-WF-24`; **Power:** `PWR-24`; **Mode:** Preview Only<br>
**Template/schema:** `TPL-25` / `whole_life_private`<br>
**Primary safe finish:** Owner-only plan + minimum viable mode

**Trigger:** The owner voluntarily chooses to create or revise a private whole-life purpose, capacity and renewal plan.<br>
**Allowed input:** DATA-D3-PRIVATE entered by the owner only; active hat `private_individual`; partition exactly `research_innovation_discover.private.owner.<owner_id>`; one-owner ACL.<br>
**Output:** Owner-only `TPL-25` validated against `whole_life_private`; no organizational view. An optional neutral bridge statement may be created only from exact wording the owner explicitly selects.<br>
**Human gate:** Owner self-review and owner self-decision only. No employer, tenant, parent lane, manager, HR, research office or institutional approval is required or permitted.<br>
**Stop/fallback:** Reject organizational routing, organizational/official references, tenant or parent access, analytics, training, agents, institutional export, forced sharing or any attempt to infer performance from use/nonuse. Leave no organizational trace beyond an optional owner-approved neutral bridge statement.<br>
**Receipt:** No separate receipt is created. The owner-private record stores only content_sha256, created_at and updated_at for owner-local integrity and resume.<br>
**Existence boundary:** No private-existence trace or institutional trace is created.<br>
**Expiry:** The owner sets review and delete dates, may delete independently at any time, and alone decides retain, revise, pause or remove.

**Steps**

1. Set the active hat to `private_individual`; create or verify only `research_innovation_discover.private.owner.<owner_id>` with a one-owner ACL; before lookup or persistence enforce `owner_id == sole ACL principal_id == partition owner suffix`.
2. Accept only owner-entered DATA-D3-PRIVATE; reject organizational, tenant, parent-lane, participant, patient, workforce, partner or other-person content and references before persistence.
3. Let the owner privately define values, aspirations, family/community commitments, protected time, capacity, Minimum Viable Leadership Mode, recovery and delete/review dates.
4. Populate TPL-25 and validate `whole_life_private`; bind no tenant, parent, organization, official-system, analytics, training, agent or institutional-export reference.
5. Show the result only to the owner for self-review and self-decision; optionally produce one neutral bridge statement only when the owner explicitly chooses its exact wording.
6. Retain only the private record's own canonical content hash and created/updated/review/delete timestamps, honor the owner-set delete instruction, and stop without a separate receipt, institutional routing, approval, sharing or export.

**Hard stop:** Any organizational authority check, official approval request, tenant/parent/organization reference, mismatch among owner ID, sole ACL principal and partition owner suffix, agent/tool access, analytics/training use, institutional export, separate receipt/private-existence trace or sharing beyond the owner's exact neutral bridge statement is a contract violation. Block before lookup/persistence, disclose nothing, discard the attempted organizational route and return control to the owner.
